default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Bisera and discuss content strategy for key clients Ramp and Reddit.](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bisera is on her 5th day, feeling overwhelmed but excited about the fast-paced environment](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Marcel aims to have Bisera shadow him closely to learn the evolving processes](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [The company has grown from 2 to 12 clients in 3-4 months, continuously improving their content creation approach](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Key focus on automating client understanding, keyword research, and content generation while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

## Topics

### Current Onboarding Status

  - [Bisera has been researching clients independently](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Assigned supportive roles for Ramp and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Access issues: Bisera lacks access to some internal documents (e.g., brand guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes AI workflows for initial content generation](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating an "MVP" of content, with intent to improve quickly](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Goal: produce content better than AI-generated answers from platforms like Perplexity or You.com](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Current challenge: lack of external links in generated content](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)

### Client Understanding Automation

  - [Workflow scrapes client website and key pages](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Generates company brief, elevator pitch, and other deliverables automatically](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Information stored in Notion for easy access and updates](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Planning

  - [Extensive keyword gap analysis based on competitors](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Use of SEMrush for identifying competitor keywords](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Creation of a database with potential article topics, including relevance scores](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [AI-assisted title and outline creation](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Human review and modification of AI suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Balance between AI acceleration and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

### Areas for Improvement

  - [Need to incorporate better citations and external links](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Bisera suggested manually adding Wikipedia links for definitions](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Marcel encourages Bisera to feel empowered to improve the process](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bisera to watch the latest workshop recording for more context](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Marcel to ensure Bisera is included in all client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Bisera to shadow Marcel during hands-on work sessions](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Address access issues for internal documents with the client (e.g., Google Drive sharing)](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Bisera to feel empowered to improve processes, especially for Ramp and Reddit accounts](https://fathom.video/share/tuRm5zzBQ9sVV_kEssnpUAZFWmhEXvpS?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

action_items.description: Grant Bisera access to relevant Reddit and Ramp documents by sharing in Google Drive
Improve existing and future Reddit and Ramp articles by adding external links and working together
